message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
participant "TraderClient" as TraderClient {
}
rectangle CommandBuilder #lightgrey [CommandBuilder] 
box TransactionManager #white
  participant "" as t1 <<Transaction>>{
    hidden member m : int = -2;
  }
end box
actor StockBroker
database TraderAccount
entity SellStockCommand
boundary Mediator
control TraderPolicy
collections PriceProvider


== Initialization ==

activate TraderClient
TraderClient ->> CommandBuilder: create_command(SellStockCommand)
deactivate TraderClient
return SellStockCommand 

note over TraderClient,Mediator\n#red:red note on several lines\ncan be defined too!
TraderClient->t1++: command_signal(SellStockCommand)\nwith some more text to see if this works or not... \nas well as line breaks in messages !



@enduml
